seo_title: MiniMax-M2 Series: Unlocking Real-World Intelligence with Mini…
meta_description: Discover the MiniMax-M2 series, a family of Mixture-of-Experts language models that unleash maximum real-world intelligence through mini activations.
body_html:
Direct answer: The MiniMax-M2 series is a family of Mixture-of-Experts language models that utilize mini activations to unleash maximum real-world intelligence.

Agent-driven data pipelines producing large-scale, verifiable trajectories across agentic coding and agentic cowork Forge, a scalable agent-native RL system with windowed-FIFO scheduling, prefix-tree merging, inference optimization, and clean training-inference-agent decoupling The latest M2.7 checkpoint with autonomously debugging training runs and modifying its own scaffold

Agentic Coding Deep Search Office-Task Reasoning

M2 Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance

M2.7 Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance Frontier-tier performance

Technical Takeaway Across M2 through M2.7, this combination translates a mini-activation footprint into frontier-tier performance on agentic coding, deep search, office-task, and reasoning benchmarks.

source.title: The MiniMax-M2 Series: Mini Activations Unleashing Max Real-World Intelligence
source.summary: Researchers have introduced the MiniMax-M2 series, a family of language models that use "mini activations" to achieve maximum real-world intelligence. The flagship M2 model has 229.9 billion parameters but only activates 9.8 billion per token, allowing for efficient deployment in agentic settings. The M2 series is built around three key components: an agent-driven data pipeline, the Forge RL system, and a self-evolving scaffold that autonomously debugs training runs. This combination has achieved high performance on various benchmarks, including agentic coding, deep search, and office tasks.
